name: SDLC One Pending One Approves Pipeline
description: Software-delivery workflow where one required assessor approves while another remains unresolved.
outcome: Successor work remains blocked while a required assessor is still pending.

definition.process_instructions: One assessor may approve while the other required assessor remains unresolved. The workflow must not advance to release packaging until all required assessments are clear.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
